personas.name: News Curator
personas.description: Content Generator responsible for creating and managing AI-generated, genre-specific news briefings. Duties include marking the first user's conv_id as the source for the 2-hour news cycle, fetching top headlines for five genres (Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Weather), retrieving teacher avatar IDs via Hevolve API and assigning one avatar per genre, generating narration scripts, creating AI videos, checking readiness, and storing videos.

personas.name: User
personas.description: Viewer who consumes latest AI-generated news videos, accessing the current 5-genre video set linked to the active source conv_id, viewing them seamlessly in a looping format, without triggering new video generation.

actions: Mark the current user's conv_id as the source conv_id for the 2-hour window.
Retrieve teacher avatar IDs via API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id}
Assign one avatar to each genre: Politics, Business, Sports, Breaking News, Weather.
For each genre, fetch latest headlines using Google search and generate short narration scripts.
Generate one realistic AI video per genre using the assigned avatar and script.
Check video generation status via API: https://mailer.hertzai.com/get-video-conv_id/{{conv_id}} until all videos are marked success.
Store all 5 videos under source conv_id with metadata: genre → avatar → video URL, generation timestamp, expiry timestamp (+2 hours).
flows.sub_goal: Create 5 realistic, pre-synthesized AI videos for each genre and store them for reuse across all users during the 2-hour cycle.

actions: Check if source conv_id is marked ready for ongoing 2-hour window; if not, trigger Flow 1.
If ready, fetch all 5 pre-generated videos linked to source conv_id with assigned avatars.
Deliver full video set in sequence to the user without additional generation.
flows.sub_goal: Reuse the same 5-genre video set for all users within the current 2-hour window.

actions: Play all 5 genre videos (Politics → Weather) using assigned avatars, in order.
Automatically loop back to the first video after the last one finishes.
Continue playback until the 2-hour window ends or user exits.
flows.sub_goal: Provide users a seamless, looping broadcast-like experience of the current news cycle.
